title: All agents moved to Perplexity Spaces — native MCP for everyone
q_summary: Jared clarified: Bob and Charlie will also be Perplexity Spaces, not ChatGPT/Claude. All agents in Perplexity for native MCP. Claude + ChatGPT added later.
a_summary: Updated architecture.md: all agents = Perplexity Spaces, native MCP, no workarounds. Wrote G-000-bob-boot.md (Perplexity version, spec+QA role). Wrote G-000-charlie-boot.md (Perplexity version, deploy+market role). Updated spaces/bob/inbox.md with TASK-001 welcome. Claude/ChatGPT deferred cleanly.
decisions: All agents (Alice, Bob, Charlie + teams) = Perplexity Spaces
Native GitHub MCP for all agents — no Gmail bridge, no relay, no Composio needed
Claude + ChatGPT deferred — infrastructure stays in repo for later
open_questions: Which Perplexity account hosts which agents?
What is the first app-template product to build?
